About.title: Georgia Tech & Hilltoppers
About.description: Daniel Mitka is a 17-year-old elite swimmer verbally committed to the Georgia Institute of Technology, where he will swim and study in the ACC. He currently trains and races for the University of Denver Hilltoppers in Colorado, and whenever he is back in Czechia he also swims for SK Motorlet Praha. A multiple-time medalist from the Czech national championships, he balances his season between racing in America and at home.

GeorgiaTech.title: Committed to Georgia Tech

commitment.p1: I am extremely excited to announce my verbal commitment to continue my academic and athletic career at the Georgia Institute of Technology.
commitment.p2: First, I want to thank my parents for supporting me from the beginning, allowing me to move on my own at the age of 16, and helping me chase my dreams.
commitment.p3: Thank you to Coach Shawn, Coach Todd, Coach Martina, Coach Sam, Ed, and Andrew for everything you have done for me.
commitment.p4: Lastly, special thank you to Coach Iago for giving me this opportunity, and to the whole Georgia Tech community for welcoming me.

GeorgiaTech.imageAlt: Daniel Mitka — Georgia Tech swimming commit
GeorgiaTech.photoSubcaption: Future Yellow Jacket · College Class of 2031

strunzova.description: A calm, conversion-focused hospitality website that turns a complex stay into a clear booking journey. Designed and developed end to end.

projectTips: 🏢 Professional website for Strunzova Pila showcasing apartment services with modern design and user-friendly interface.
⚡ Built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript for fast loading and excellent user experience.
🎯 Features responsive design with Tailwind CSS ensuring perfect display on all screen sizes.
🚀 Optimized for SEO and performance with modern web development best practices.
📚 Interactive flashcard application for learning new words and phrases with spaced repetition system.
🔐 Secure user authentication with bcrypt password hashing and Prisma database integration.
📧 Email functionality using Resend for user notifications and account management.
🎯 Spaced repetition algorithm to optimize learning efficiency and long-term retention.
🤖 Automated bot for ticket purchasing on Ticketportal with advanced search parameters and event targeting.
🔧 Built with Node.js and Puppeteer for reliable web automation and ticket purchasing.
🛡️ Includes ReCaptcha handling and advanced error handling for robust operation.
⚙️ Configurable search parameters allowing customization for different events and preferences.
💕 A romantic website with interactive hearts and beautiful animations counting special moments together.
🎨 Features custom CSS animations and responsive design that works perfectly on all devices.
💝 Built with pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for optimal performance and smooth user experience.
📱 Mobile-first design approach ensuring the romantic experience is perfect on phones and tablets.

hero.title: Czech National Junior Championship
hero.subtitle: Podolí 2025
hero.eventDescription: Outstanding results at the prestigious junior national competition in Prague

story.title: A Championship Weekend to Remember
story.paragraph1: The Czech National Junior Championship 2025 in Podolí was a defining moment in Daniel's swimming career. Competing against the best junior swimmers in the country, Daniel showcased exceptional versatility across multiple disciplines.
story.highlight: Bronze medal in 400m Individual Medley - the most demanding swimming event that tests all four strokes.
story.paragraph2: This prestigious competition brought together the top junior swimmers from across the Czech Republic, with Daniel representing SK Motorlet Praha with distinction. His performance across multiple events demonstrated not just technical skill, but mental toughness and competitive spirit.

videos.title: Competition Videos
videos.description: Highlights and race footage from the championship will be available here soon.

highlights.title: Championship Highlights
highlights.description: This competition represents the pinnacle of junior swimming in the Czech Republic. Daniel's bronze medal performance in the 400m Individual Medley, along with strong showings in other events, demonstrates his potential as one of the country's most promising young swimmers.
highlights.experience: A weekend that showcased the future of Czech swimming

Footer.swimcloudTooltip: View my swimming times on SwimCloud
Footer.githubTooltip: Check out my code on GitHub

story.title: The Championship Story
story.paragraph1: At the prestigious 2024 Lifesaving World Championships in Gold Coast, Australia, Daniel Mitka demonstrated exceptional prowess in multiple disciplines, proudly representing the Czech Republic in the junior category.
story.highlight: The championship's pinnacle moment came with securing the silver medal in the Line Throw event, where Daniel and Adam Pekař's perfect synchronization showcased Czech excellence on the international stage.
story.paragraph2: This achievement represents not just individual skill, but the culmination of years of dedicated training and teamwork that has placed Czech lifesaving on the world map.

achievements.description: Outperforming teams from New Zealand and South Africa

story.title: Elite Team Championship
story.paragraph1: The Team Championship Finals in Ostrava represents the pinnacle of Czech club swimming, where only the best teams advance after rigorous semifinal competitions. Motorlet Praha earned their place through exceptional performances in earlier rounds.
story.quote: We advance to the finals, which will be held on March 22-23 in Ostrava - celebrating the successful semifinal campaign that brought both men's and women's teams to the elite level.
story.paragraph2: The finals showcased Daniel's versatility across multiple disciplines, contributing crucial points to Motorlet Praha's overall team success in this prestigious competition.

events.description: All four strokes combined - best individual result

eventVideos.title: Event Videos
eventVideos.videoDescription: Watch Daniel's performance in the {event} at the Team Championship Finals in Ostrava. Final time: {time}, earning {points} and finishing {placement}.

highlights.title: Championship Impact
highlights.description: The Team Championship Finals in Ostrava showcased the strength of Czech club swimming, with Motorlet Praha achieving solid results across both men's and women's divisions. Daniel's contribution across four individual events demonstrated his versatility and commitment to team success.

story.title: International Experience
story.paragraph1: The Slovakia Cup in Šamorín on October 25, 2024, was a showcase of versatility where Daniel Mitka competed across five different swimming events, demonstrating technical proficiency in both freestyle and individual medley disciplines.
story.highlight: Standout performances included a strong 100m freestyle time of 0:52.82 and consistent individual medley swims across 100m, 200m, and 400m distances, showing excellent stroke technique and endurance.
story.paragraph2: The competition featured multiple events ranging from sprint distances to challenging 400m individual medley, testing both speed and technical mastery across all four competitive swimming strokes.

eventsList.description: Personal best in all four swimming strokes

story.title: National Competition Excellence
story.paragraph1: The Czech Junior Summer Championship in Podolí is one of the season's peak domestic meets, where the country's best junior swimmers race for national titles and records.
story.highlight: Competing at this level demands not only technical excellence but also mental fortitude to perform under the pressure of representing your region at the highest national standard.
story.paragraph2: This championship serves as a crucial stepping stone for international competitions and demonstrates Daniel's commitment to achieving excellence in Czech swimming.

eventsList.description: Heats: 2:11.91 | Finals: 2:11.92 - All four strokes combined
Heats: 2:00.50 | Finals: 1:57.72 - Excellent improvement in finals

highlights.title: Championship Experience
highlights.description: The Czech Junior Summer Championship in Podolí offered an invaluable chance to race the country's top juniors in a world-class facility.

story.title: International Swimming Competition
story.paragraph1: The Plzen Czech Open Championship represents one of the most prestigious international swimming competitions in the Czech Republic, attracting elite swimmers from across Europe. The event showcases the highest level of competitive swimming with exceptional performances.
story.quote: Competing against international talent in Plzen provided invaluable experience and opportunities to test skills against Europe's finest swimmers.
story.paragraph2: Daniel demonstrated remarkable versatility and determination throughout the competition, achieving personal bests and contributing to Motorlet Praha's strong international presence.
